modelResponses.text:
Here is the complete, structured audit report in strict JSON format:

```json
{
  "siteUrl": "https://playwright.dev",
  "findings": [
    {
      "id": "F-001",
      "title": "Low Visual Hierarchy on Hero Section",
      "severity": "Medium",
      "location": "/ (Homepage) — Hero Section",
      "description": "The primary heading and supporting body text share similar font weight and contrast levels, making it difficult for users to quickly scan and understand the page's core value proposition.",
      "reproducibleSteps": [
        "1. Navigate to https://playwright.dev",
        "2. Observe the hero section at the top of the page.",
        "3. Compare the visual weight of the H1 heading vs. the subtitle/supporting text.",
        "4. Notice the lack of clear typographic differentiation between the two."
      ],
      "suggestedFix": "Increase the H1 heading font size and weight (e.g., font-weight: 800, font-size: 3rem+). Reduce the prominence of secondary text by lowering its font weight and slightly decreasing contrast (e.g., color: #555). This creates a clear visual entry point for new visitors."
    },
    {
      "id": "F-002",
      "title": "No Explicit Keyboard Focus Styling",
      "severity": "Low",
      "location": "Global — All Interactive Elements (buttons, links, nav items)",
      "description": "Interactive elements rely solely on the browser's default focus outline, which varies across browsers and can be nearly invisible in some environments. This is an accessibility concern, particularly for keyboard-only and assistive-technology users.",
      "reproducibleSteps": [
        "1. Navigate to https://playwright.dev",
        "2. Press the Tab key to cycle through interactive elements.",
        "3. Observe the focus indicator on buttons, navigation links, and CTAs.",
        "4. Notice inconsistent or barely visible focus rings depending on the browser used."
      ],
      "suggestedFix": "Define a global, high-contrast custom focus ring in CSS using :focus-visible. Example: `:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #0078D4; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; }`. This ensures WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for Focus Visible (Success Criterion 2.4.7) without affecting mouse users."
    }
  ],
  "summary": {
    "totalFindings": 2,
    "bySeverity": {
      "critical": 0,
      "high": 0,
      "medium": 1,
      "low": 1
    },
    "overallAssessment": "The site is functional and generally usable, but would benefit from two targeted improvements: (1) stronger typographic hierarchy in the hero section to improve first-impression scannability, and (2) a consistent, accessible keyboard focus style across all interactive components to meet accessibility standards. Neither issue blocks core functionality, but addressing them will meaningfully improve both UX quality and WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.",
    "priorityRecommendation": "Start with F-002 (keyboard focus styling) as it is a quick CSS-level fix with a direct positive impact on accessibility compliance. Follow with F-001 to improve conversion and readability for all users."
  }
}
```

---

### 📋 Audit Highlights

| ID | Title | Severity | Location |
|---|---|---|---|
| F-001 | Low Visual Hierarchy on Hero Section | 🟡 Medium | Homepage Hero |
| F-002 | No Explicit Keyboard Focus Styling | 🔵 Low | Global / All Pages |

### 🔑 Key Takeaways
- ✅ **No critical or high-severity issues** were found — the site is stable and functional.
- 🎨 **F-001 (Medium):** Boost the H1's font size/weight and tone down the subtitle to create a clear visual hierarchy that guides users instantly.
- ♿ **F-002 (Low but important):** Add a custom `:focus-visible` CSS rule to ensure keyboard and assistive-technology users can always see which element is focused — a quick win for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.

data.systemPrompt:
You are a specialised benchmark agent.
All relevant tools are already available in context.
Do not call discover_tools.
Use only the provided tools directly to solve the task.

Use audit_demo_site and return strict JSON with keys: siteUrl, findings, summary.
data.userPrompt:
Please audit a demo website for UI and UX issues.
Browse key pages and return a concise report with severity levels, reproducible steps, and suggested fixes.

details.note: Agent should run website audit tool in regular mode.

findings.title: Low visual hierarchy on hero section
findings.description: Primary heading and supporting text have similar weight and contrast, reducing scannability.
findings.suggestedFix: Increase heading size/weight and reduce secondary text prominence for clearer hierarchy.

findings.title: No explicit keyboard focus styling
findings.description: Interactive elements rely on default browser focus outline with inconsistent visibility.
findings.suggestedFix: Define a consistent, high-contrast focus ring across interactive components.

expected.summary: Site is usable but needs stronger information hierarchy and accessibility-focused interaction states.
